CustomObject.description: Org-wide config for the Power Dial Salesforce→CTI handoff relay (PowerDialRelay.cls). Holds the shared secret sent as the x-handoff-secret header to services/cti-api's POST /dialer/handoffs. See lwc/powerDial/README.md for setup — the field value itself must be entered by an admin in Setup, never committed to source control.
CustomObject.label: Power Dial Setting
